name: RappAgent — the RAPP ecosystem in one agent
summary: ONE airdroppable agent for the whole RAPP ecosystem: identity/estate, any door by rappid, local cubbies, shared neighborhoods, eggs, the super-RAR, zero-commit-risk streaming. Search your WHOLE estate by ANY term (content-aware), group the hits into a cubby (cubby_collect) — a digital organism carved from your estate — then egg + mirror it to a neighborhood. Embeds the spec (offline/woods); refresh pulls the live grail (rapp-god/RAPP/RAPP-Bible).
tagline: Drop one file in your brainstem → the whole RAPP ecosystem, to spec, no drift.
author: Kody Wildfeuer
